title: Lack of Unit Tests for New Logic
description: The new logic in the ingestion and promote commands lacks unit tests, which is against the testing policy.

root_cause_potential: New command logic implemented without corresponding test coverage
Testing policy not followed during development
Missing test cases for critical command functionality
No automated testing for command validation logic
technical_analysis.suggested_solution: Implement unit tests for all new logic to ensure coverage

reproduction_steps: 1. Review current test coverage for ingestion command
2. Review current test coverage for promote command
3. Identify gaps in test coverage for new functionality
4. Run test suite and verify coverage reports
expected_behavior: All new command logic should have comprehensive unit test coverage per testing policy
actual_behavior: New ingestion and promotion command logic lacks unit tests

immediate_fixes.action: Create unit tests for ingestion command logic
immediate_fixes.rationale: Ensure ingestion functionality is properly tested

immediate_fixes.action: Create unit tests for promote command logic
immediate_fixes.rationale: Ensure promotion functionality is properly tested

immediate_fixes.action: Add tests to CI/CD pipeline for command validation
immediate_fixes.rationale: Prevent future deployments without proper test coverage

impact_assessment.user_impact: Low - No direct user impact, but affects code quality
impact_assessment.urgency: Low - Should be addressed in next development cycle
